files.SKILL.md:
# Mechanical Capture Operator

## Core idea
For outputs that must land exactly in files or pipes, capture mechanically—redirects, direct writes, structured dumps—rather than hand-transcribing from memory.

## Practice
Pipe tool output to the destination the spec names; avoid retyping computed values.

## Anti-patterns
Paraphrasing numbers or hashes into chat  instead of preserving tool literals; “pretty” reformats that violate required formatting.
